intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: Welcome to Malta Luxury Real Estate. We are committed to protecting your personal data and your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website and use our services.

controller.title: Data Controller Information:
controller.details:
Brand House Dawid Ziobro
VAT ID: PL6381513187
Address: Strachocin 31, 57-550 Stronie Śląskie, Poland

collect.title: 2. Data We Collect
collect.intro: We collect information that you provide directly to us through forms and interactions on our site:

points.contact: Contact Information: Name, email address, and phone number when you inquire about a property.
points.preferences: Preferences: Information about properties you save to your favorites.
points.technical: Technical Data: IP address, browser type, and device information collected via analytics cookies.

use.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
use.intro: We process your data for the following purposes:

points.communication: To facilitate communication between you and real estate agencies (performance of a contract).
points.improvement: To improve our website performance and user experience (legitimate interest).
points.legal: To comply with legal obligations in Malta and the European Union.

rights.title: 4. Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.intro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the followings rights:

points.access: The right to access and receive a copy of your data.
points.rectification: The right to rectification of inaccurate data.
points.erasure: The right to erasure ('right to be forgotten').
points.object: The right to object to processing based on legitimate interests.

contact.title: 5. Contact Information
contact.content: For any questions regarding this policy or to exercise your data rights, please contact us at:

nature.title: 1. Platform Nature
nature.content: Malta Luxury Real Estate is a specialized advertising platform and marketplace. We are not a real estate broker. We provide a space for sellers, agencies, and developers to showcase luxury properties to potential buyers.

liability.title: 2. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: While we strive for accuracy, the property data on our site is provided by third-party agencies. Malta Luxury Real Estate cannot be held liable for inaccuracies, changes in pricing, or the withdrawal of properties from the market. Users are advised to verify all details with the listing agency.

ip.title: 3. Intellectual Property
ip.content: All branding, design elements, and content generated by Malta Luxury Real Estate are intellectual property owned by Brand House Dawid Ziobro. Reproduction without express written consent is prohibited.

law.title: 4. Governing Law
law.content: This agreement is governed by the laws of Malta. Any disputes arising from the use of this platform shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the Maltese courts.

definition.title: 1. What are Cookies?
definition.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help us provide a seamless user experience. They allow us to remember your preferences and analyze how our site is used.

essential.title: 2. Essential Cookies
essential.content: These cookies are necessary for the website to function. Without them, features like 'Saved Favorites' or map functionalities cannot operate correctly.

third_party.title: 3. Third-Party Services
third_party.intro: We use controlled third-party tools that may set cookies:

points.mapbox: Mapbox: Used to display interactive property locations on the archipelago.
points.analytics: Google Analytics: (Anonymized) Used to understand how visitors interact with our content.

preferences.title: 4. Managing Preferences
preferences.content: You can disable cookies through your browser settings. However, please note that some features of the platform may not function as intended without them.
